description: A cross-platform desktop client for SQL, NoSQL, object storage, and HTTP APIs — browse, edit, and query every data source side by side.
A local Windows automation agent controlled via Telegram — manage apps, files, system actions, and messaging with secure, real-time commands.
A Finder-style, local-first file manager built in Flutter, with a built-in Ollama chat panel, a Quick-Look-style preview viewer, and a workflow editor for prompt chains against your files.
